allow: PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "gh: $\($g.Source\)" } else { "gh: not found" }; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email)
PowerShell($n = git config --global user.name; $e = git config --global user.email; "name=[$n]"; "email=[$e]")
